title: Governance Root Normalization
purpose: Create stable governance root structure with canonical naming, schema versioning, and folder taxonomy.
exit_criteria: Base schemas validate against schema validator
Governance README explains canonical state principle
downstream_impact: Blocks M12 (Projection), M14 (Workflows), M17 (Automation).
trust_principle: Governance integrity ensures all downstream systems operate on reliable foundations.

title: Projection Architecture
purpose: Separate canonical JSON state from Markdown projections. JSON is source of truth; Markdown is human-readable rendering.
exit_criteria: At least one projection generated from JSON
project-knowledge files identified for dual-format migration
downstream_impact: Enables M17 (Automation). Blocks any automated doc generation.
trust_principle: Governance integrity ensures all downstream systems operate on reliable foundations.

title: Runtime-Critical Registry
purpose: Track only critical runtime systems: auth, database, deployment, API boundaries, shared infrastructure.
exit_criteria: API boundary subsystem registered with ownership
Criticality classification applied to all registered subsystems
downstream_impact: Enables M17 (Automation). Provides data for repository intelligence.
trust_principle: Governance integrity ensures all downstream systems operate on reliable foundations.

title: Governance Workflow Layer
purpose: Formalize execution workflows: ticket schemas, milestone schemas, checkpoint schemas, resume packet schemas, completion report schemas.
exit_criteria: All schemas validate with strict mode
Existing M0.5 and T0.5.1 schema violations fixed
downstream_impact: Blocks M15 (GES), M16 (Telemetry). Enables structured governance workflows.
trust_principle: Governance integrity ensures all downstream systems operate on reliable foundations.

title: Governance Event System
purpose: Introduce governance lineage tracking: governance mutations, workflow triggers, AI proposal lineage, human approvals.
exit_criteria: At least 3 governance mutations logged with full lineage
downstream_impact: Enables M18 (Authority Levels). Provides audit trail for all governance changes.
trust_principle: Governance integrity ensures all downstream systems operate on reliable foundations.

title: Operational Telemetry
purpose: Add execution observability: heartbeat events, execution state tracking, drift reporting, validation telemetry.
exit_criteria: Drift report generated from telemetry data
Validation telemetry captures at least 3 validation runs
downstream_impact: Enables M18 (Authority Levels). Provides data for drift monitoring.
trust_principle: Governance integrity ensures all downstream systems operate on reliable foundations.

title: Governance Automation
purpose: Introduce safe automation: metadata generation, projection generation, repository audits, schema validation.
exit_criteria: Metadata generation produces valid ticket JSON
Projection generation produces valid Markdown from JSON
Schema validation catches at least one violation
downstream_impact: Reduces manual governance overhead. Enables self-maintaining governance system.
trust_principle: Governance integrity ensures all downstream systems operate on reliable foundations.

title: Governance Authority Levels
purpose: Implement graduated AI authority system: approval workflows, drift monitoring, rollback requirements, intervention thresholds.
exit_criteria: Drift monitoring catches at least one anomaly
downstream_impact: Enables selective autonomous governance. Human retains final authority.
trust_principle: Governance integrity ensures all downstream systems operate on reliable foundations.

title: SYNTH Extraction Preparation
purpose: Prepare reusable governance substrate for SYNTH extraction. Isolate VINTRACK-specific business logic.

out: Hard dependency between SYNTH and VINTRACK

exit_criteria: Governance substrate passes all tests independently
SYNTH package has zero VINTRACK business logic
Extraction validated with at least one external test
downstream_impact: Governance becomes reusable product. VINTRACK runtime remains independent.
trust_principle: Governance integrity ensures all downstream systems operate on reliable foundations.

title: Governance Enforcement Stabilization
purpose: Stabilize and normalize the governance substrate before additional feature expansion. Eliminate authority fragmentation, introduce machine-readable governance definitions, and establish a unified event bus for runtime observability. This milestone is infrastructure-critical and governance-priority.
trust_principle: A governance system that cannot observe itself cannot correct itself. A governance system with contradictory authorities cannot be trusted.

in: Canonical authority hierarchy with layered precedence
Governance event bus with append-only event stream
Generated markdown reflections from canonical JSON
Runtime validators generated from protocol definitions

exit_criteria: All governance documents declare explicit authority metadata
JSON protocol definitions exist for all critical protocols
Governance event bus emits events for all major runtime actions
Generated artifacts validate against canonical schemas
npm run governance:generate produces deterministic output
Event query tool can filter by category, severity, ticket, milestone
downstream_impact: Blocks all feature milestones that depend on governance correctness. Unblocks M12-M19 governance milestones by providing stable substrate.

title: Runtime Observability and Diagnostics
purpose: Operationalize visibility. Without observability, debugging remains fragile, governance remains opaque, suggestions remain weak, and runtime continuity remains unreliable.
trust_principle: A system that cannot observe itself cannot debug itself.
exit_criteria: All 7 telemetry categories emit structured events
Replay reconstructs any execution from event stream plus checkpoints
Diagnostic console displays active execution state and surfaces anomalies
downstream_impact: Enables M22 (Governance Intelligence). Blocks any system that requires runtime visibility.

title: Governance Intelligence and Suggestions
purpose: Introduce adaptive operational intelligence. The system becomes context-aware, proactive, and operator-assistive.
trust_principle: Intelligence without observability is hallucination.
exit_criteria: Suggestion engine generates deterministic recommendations with rationale
Recipe framework supports 7 categories with prerequisites and rollback
Pattern intelligence detects recurring operational sequences
No harmful suggestions during degraded states
downstream_impact: Enables M23 (Deterministic Execution Engine). Provides intelligence substrate for orchestration.

title: Deterministic Execution Engine
purpose: Evolve governance into runtime orchestration. Formalize execution transitions, eliminate invalid runtime states.
trust_principle: Orchestration without state machines is chaos.
exit_criteria: 9 execution states with valid transitions enforced
Locking prevents overlapping mutations with stale detection
Enforcement engine blocks invalid transitions and emits violations
All state mutations logged to governance event bus
downstream_impact: Enables M24 (Autonomous Governance Operations). Provides orchestration substrate for autonomy.

title: Autonomous Governance Operations
purpose: The system becomes semi-autonomous. Self-healing mechanisms and scheduled audits reduce manual remediation.
trust_principle: Autonomy without auditability is liability.
exit_criteria: Self-healing repairs predictable inconsistencies with audit trails
Autonomous audits detect drift and integrity violations
All healing actions reversible with snapshots
Audit reports include severity scores and remediation
downstream_impact: Enables M25 (Deployment Governance). Provides health substrate for deployment readiness.

title: Governance Kernel Stabilization
purpose: Reduce semantic fragmentation and normalize governance infrastructure before further expansion.
trust_principle: A governance system with contradictory authorities cannot be trusted. A governance system with split sources of truth cannot be maintained.
exit_criteria: All governance registries normalized with 100% protocol coverage
Reflection drift impossible via deterministic generation
downstream_impact: Enables M27–M35 stabilization wave. Without this, all subsequent milestones fight registry fragmentation.

title: Deployment Governance
purpose: Prevent deployment chaos. Enforce operational readiness before release.
trust_principle: Deployment without governance is surrender.
exit_criteria: Deployment readiness validates all blockers before release
Readiness report is deterministic and human-readable
Emergency bypass available with mandatory audit
downstream_impact: Feature milestones resume after M25. Governance wave complete.

title: Formal Invariant System
purpose: Define machine-verifiable global invariants for the governance runtime.
trust_principle: A system without invariants is a system without guarantees.
exit_criteria: CI blocks PRs with critical invariant violations
downstream_impact: Enables M28–M35 by providing runtime safety guarantees.

title: Runtime Storage Abstraction
purpose: Prepare the system for future distributed/runtime scaling by abstracting all storage mutations.
trust_principle: Direct filesystem mutation is a liability.
exit_criteria: All runtime mutations pass through storage adapters
No direct fs mutations in runtime scripts
downstream_impact: Enables distributed execution and database-backed storage in future phases.

migration_debt.description: Direct fs mutations remain in runtime scripts

title: Event Causality & Replay Integrity
purpose: Guarantee deterministic replay under concurrency via global event sequence IDs and causality chains.
trust_principle: Timestamps are not deterministic ordering.
exit_criteria: Every event has global_sequence, execution_sequence, parent_event_id, causality_chain
downstream_impact: Enables reliable debugging, auditing, and forensics under concurrent execution.

title: Governance Architecture Mapping
purpose: Make the system understandable again via generated architecture maps and diagrams.
trust_principle: A system that cannot be visualized cannot be reasoned about.
downstream_impact: Enables onboarding, debugging, and architectural reasoning.

title: Operational Control Plane
purpose: Govern operational ergonomics as a first-class runtime surface. CLI-first, JSON-native, projection-driven. Consumes canonical registries without duplicating semantics.
trust_principle: Operational ergonomics must emerge from stable semantics, not precede them.

in: Execution recipes (machine-readable, composable, queryable, executable, projectable)

exit_criteria: Recipe registry is machine-readable, composable, queryable, executable, and projectable
Operator can discover all commands via governance query interface
Milestone and ticket reports are deterministically serializable with continuation markers
Runtime inspection surfaces consume canonical registries directly
Markdown projections are generated from canonical JSON, never authoritative
Segmented report serialization supports PART N/M markers and deterministic resume
All control plane actions emit governance events
No registry semantics duplicated in control plane code
downstream_impact: Enables day-to-day governance runtime operation at scale.

title: Scalability & Performance Characterization
purpose: Understand operational limits BEFORE failure.
trust_principle: You cannot scale what you cannot measure.
exit_criteria: Load tests simulate large event streams, replay storms, concurrent locks
Performance baselined for all critical operations
downstream_impact: Prevents operational surprises and enables informed scaling decisions.

title: Adversarial Governance Testing
purpose: Attack the governance system intentionally to verify resilience.
trust_principle: A system that has never been attacked has never been tested.
downstream_impact: Builds confidence in governance runtime resilience under failure.

title: Protocol Lifecycle & Evolution Governance
purpose: Prevent protocol evolution chaos.
trust_principle: Without lifecycle governance, protocol drift becomes catastrophic.
downstream_impact: Enables safe long-term evolution of governance protocols.

title: System Documentation & User Manual Platform
purpose: Create a complete, canonical, maintainable documentation ecosystem for the governance runtime.
trust_principle: The system is now too sophisticated for implicit understanding.
downstream_impact: Enables onboarding, operational learning, and long-term maintainability.
